grammar_points.student_explanation: always/usually/often/sometimes/never 表示做事的频率，放在be动词后、行为动词前
grammar_points.teacher_explanation: 频率副词表示动作发生的频率，从高到低：always > usually > often > sometimes > never。放在be动词之后、行为动词之前。

correct_examples.sentence: I always go to school by bus.

wrong_examples.sentence: I go always to school by bus.
wrong_examples.correction: I always go to school by bus.

grammar_points.error_reason: 学生容易混淆正确用法
